name: Swapnil Jain

message: Hey Harshit — shipped idempotent Razorpay webhooks with 100% payment consistency and cut API latency 40% via N+1 resolution at OpenBiz. No ramp needed on Razorpay's payments infrastructure. Looking to connect.
notes: Tier 4 | assets: Razorpay webhooks+100%+N+1+40% | domain: payments infrastructure | day-one framing for eng manager
